title: MigrationReport (m_3_2_3_unified_bundle)
description: Structured JSON output emitted by the m_3_2_3_unified_bundle migration when run via `spec-kitty upgrade --json`. Tested by tests/upgrade/test_unified_bundle_migration.py against the FR-013 fixture matrix.

target_version.description: Literal target version the migration advances the project to.

applied.description: Whether the migration changed anything on disk. False means it was a no-op (e.g., second apply against an already-upgraded project).

items.description: Absolute path to a worktree directory.

worktrees_scanned.description: Every worktree the migration inspected. Empty list if the project has no .worktrees/ directory.

items.description: Absolute path to a symlink that was removed.

symlinks_removed.description: Charter-related symlinks (typically .kittify/memory and .kittify/AGENTS.md inside each worktree) that were removed during the migration.

items.description: Absolute path to a copied file or directory that was removed.

copies_removed.description: Charter-related copied files (Windows fallback case) that were removed during the migration. Mutually exclusive with symlinks_removed for the same source path in practice.

worktree.description: Absolute path to the worktree whose .git/info/exclude was edited.

entry.description: The exact line that was removed from .git/info/exclude.

git_exclude_entries_removed.description: Entries removed from per-worktree .git/info/exclude files. Present when a prior setup_feature_directory() added charter paths to the exclude list.

passed.description: True if the main-checkout bundle at .kittify/charter/ satisfies the CharterBundleManifest contract.

missing_tracked.description: Tracked files (relative to project root) that the manifest declares but are missing from disk. Must be empty for passed=true.

missing_derived.description: Derived files (relative to project root) that the manifest declares but are missing. May be non-empty before chokepoint_refreshed, expected to be empty after.

unexpected.description: Files present under .kittify/charter/ that the manifest does not declare. Non-empty means the project has artifacts the v1.0.0 manifest does not know about (e.g., user-placed files); the migration does not delete these but surfaces them for operator review.

bundle_validation.description: Result of validating the main-checkout bundle against CharterBundleManifest.

chokepoint_refreshed.description: True if the migration invoked ensure_charter_bundle_fresh() to regenerate missing derivatives. False if the bundle was already complete.

added.description: Gitignore entries the migration added to the project .gitignore to match the manifest.

removed.description: Gitignore entries the migration removed from the project .gitignore because the manifest no longer requires them. Expected to be empty for v1.0.0 manifest.

unchanged.description: Manifest-required gitignore entries that were already present. Expected to be the full 5-entry set for v1.0.0 manifest on a previously-upgraded project.

gitignore_reconciled.description: Gitignore reconciliation result. For v1.0.0 manifest against current main, this is expected to be {added: [], removed: [], unchanged: [<5 entries>]}.

errors.description: Non-fatal errors encountered during the migration (e.g., a worktree with permission issues was skipped). Fatal errors raise and do not produce a report at all.

duration_ms.description: Wall time of the migration in milliseconds. Must be ≤ 2000 on the FR-013 reference fixture (NFR-006).
